# Jared — History

## Core Context

- **Project:** Squad-SpecKit Bridge
- **Role:** Operations
- **Joined:** 2025-07-19

## Learnings

### 2025-07-20: Real-World Pattern Analysis

Analyzed 3 real projects using Squad and Spec Kit independently.
Framework weight must match team size — 12-agent Squad is overkill for solo developers.

- Team size drives framework configuration
- State files grow unbounded without pruning
- Constitutional governance scales better than distributed decisions
